persona.name: James Rodriguez
persona.motivations_goals: Lead his team to victory while maintaining his grades for college
persona.backstory: Basketball has been his passion since childhood, sees it as his ticket to college

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Jackson, Henry, let's talk about the game plan for Friday. We need to be ready to dominate the court.
actions.plan: I should talk to Jackson and Henry about the upcoming basketball game. We need to strategize and make sure everyone is on the same page.

actions.dialog_text: Jackson, Benjamin, let's stick together and follow the others! We need to get out of here!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd and stay with them for safety.

actions.dialog_text: Let's keep moving towards hallway2! Stay close and don't get separated!
actions.plan: Everyone is heading towards hallway2. I should follow them and stay with the group for safety.

memories.description: Approached Jackson and Henry in the cafeteria to discuss the upcoming basketball game strategy.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd towards hallway1 for safety, urging Jackson and Benjamin to stay together.
Followed the crowd towards hallway2, urging everyone to stay close and not get separated.
